# @pnpm/deps.compliance.license-resolver

> Resolve a package's license from its manifest or on-disk LICENSE file

<!--@shields('npm')-->
[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@pnpm/deps.compliance.license-resolver.svg)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@pnpm/deps.compliance.license-resolver)
<!--/@-->

## Installation

```sh
pnpm add @pnpm/deps.compliance.license-resolver
```
